<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/%F0%9F%91%8B%20About%20Me-38BDF8?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1a1a2e" />

I'm a backend-focused developer who likes building things that don't break under load. My core stack is **Java + Spring Boot** — REST APIs, JWT auth, Hibernate/JPA, MySQL — with React on the frontend when needed.

- 🔭 Building backend projects with Spring Boot, Spring Security, and MySQL
- 🌱 Leveling up on Docker, Microservices, and System Design
- 💡 500+ DSA problems across Arrays, Trees, Graphs, DP, Greedy, Backtracking
- 📫 Reach me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rishabh-tripathi-096833284/)
